---
pagetitle: "Projects — Simon"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

<!-- ========== PROJECTS HERO ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white style="padding-top: 6rem;"}
::: {.section-wide}

[Portfolio]{.section-label}

## Projects {.section-heading}

Each project represents a real challenge I tackled — from data collection and exploration through model development to production deployment. Click through to explore the code and live demos.

:::
:::


<!-- ========== FEATURED PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section}
::: {.section-wide}

[Highlights]{.section-label}

### Featured Projects

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
:::

### Private Equity Forecast Analysis

Spearheaded a quantitative strategy to evaluate private equity underwriting accuracy by leading a team of 7 to analyze historical performance versus projected forecasts. Designed core analysis quantifying the correlation between initial EBITDA/Sales projections and final investment success while translating complex metrics into actionable insights for stakeholders.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Quantitative Modeling]{.tag} [Predictive Analytics]{.tag} [Data Visualization]{.tag} [Leadership]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/Private-Equity-Forecast-Quantitative-Analysis){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-house-door"></i>
:::

### RoomExchange: University Housing Platform

Architected a full-stack housing swap platform that enables students to list and locate properties to address campus accommodation shortages. Engineered modular frontend logic and integrated Leaflet and Mapbox APIs for dynamic geolocation visualization, earning 2nd Place in the UC Davis Big Bang! Business Competition.

::: {.tag-row}
[React]{.tag} [Mapbox API]{.tag} [Leaflet]{.tag} [Full-Stack]{.tag} [Product Design]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/RoomExchange){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://roomexchange.netlify.app/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-robot"></i>
:::

### Wikipedia RAG Q&A System

Built an interactive R-based Shiny web application allowing users to pose natural language questions and receive grounded, citation-rich answers synthesized from relevant Wikipedia pages. The system automatically reformulates queries using an LLM to improve search accuracy, retrieves wikitext, and synthesizes a unified response while handling MediaWiki and OpenAI API interactions.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag} [LLM]{.tag} [API Integration]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/Wiki-ChatBot-RAG-){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Live Demo](https://019ae764-a793-59ee-0e7a-bba44f6653b4.share.connect.posit.cloud/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== MORE PROJECTS ========== -->
::: {.section .bg-white}
::: {.section-wide}

[More Work]{.section-label}

### Additional Projects

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .purple}
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
:::

### Mapping California Education Disparities

Performed spatial analysis on the correlation between socioeconomic status and educational outcomes across California school districts. Developed a series of bivariate choropleth maps and conducted Hot Spot Analysis (Getis-Ord Gi*) to identify statistically significant clusters of underperformance and resource gaps.

::: {.tag-row}
[ArcGIS Pro]{.tag} [Spatial Statistics]{.tag} [Data Visualization]{.tag} [Public Policy]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .teal}
<i class="bi bi-shop"></i>
:::

### Geospatial Market Accessibility Modeling

Developed a gravity-based accessibility model to evaluate the relationship between transportation infrastructure and commercial growth in urban areas. Used network analysis to calculate travel-time cost surfaces, enabling data-driven site selection recommendations for retail expansion.

::: {.tag-row}
[GIS]{.tag} [Network Analysis]{.tag} [Market Research]{.tag} [Urban Planning]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides"></i> Slides](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .red}
<i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
:::

### Data Driven Crime Analysis for New York City

Collected and integrated data from three sources, consolidating a dataset of over 100,000 rows for comprehensive analysis. Performed data cleaning, feature engineering, and exploratory analysis using Python, uncovering key correlations between crime patterns and external factors. Built regression models with an $R^{2}$ of 0.85, enabling accurate crime trend forecasts. Designed and presented interactive dashboards in Tableau, visualizing high-risk areas.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Tableau]{.tag} [Regression Models]{.tag} [EDA]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Demo](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .blue}
<i class="bi bi-factory"></i>
:::

### Manufacturing Industry PMI Data Analysis

Conducted a comprehensive analysis of China's Manufacturing PMI data, focusing on relationships among raw material inventory, production, and employment indicators. Performed exploratory data analysis (EDA) to build a heat map to show and identify correlations between production levels, inventory turnover rates, and employment metrics. Utilized machine learning models for IC prediction, providing data support for future manufacturing decisions.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Machine Learning]{.tag} [Pandas]{.tag} [Matplotlib]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .orange}
<i class="bi bi-fire"></i>
:::

### Wildfire Risk Mapping

Conducted research on the distribution and influencing factors of high-frequency wildfire zones in Washington State and designed buffer zone models. Utilized ArcGIS to create spatial models and analyze spatial correlations between wildfire zones and surrounding environments. Used JavaScript to develop a web-based geographic dashboard, achieving multi-layered dynamic data interaction and optimizing the user experience.

::: {.tag-row}
[ArcGIS]{.tag} [JavaScript]{.tag} [Spatial Modeling]{.tag} [Data Analysis]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .purple}
<i class="bi bi-gpu-card"></i>
:::

### LLM Serving System Scheduling Simulation

Developed a discrete-event simulation tool to model large language model (LLM) inference systems, specifically capturing prompt processing (prefill) and token generation (decode) constraints on a single GPU. Evaluated complete-to-end and prefill-first scheduling strategies under varying user demand to measure throughput, time-to-first-token (TTFT), and time-between-tokens (TBT). Identified capacity-driven phase transitions and latency trade-offs to guide system design.

::: {.tag-row}
[Simulation]{.tag} [System Design]{.tag} [LLM]{.tag} [Performance Analysis]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .teal}
<i class="bi bi-wind"></i>
:::

### NYC Air Quality Analysis

Created an interactive Shiny dashboard to analyze New York City air quality trends (PM2.5, NO2, O3) and their correlation with socioeconomic indicators and public health outcomes like asthma emergency visits. Integrated multi-source datasets and designed interactive maps with sf-polygons and dynamic reference lines to highlight environmental disparities and assist policymakers and researchers.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag} [Data Visualization]{.tag} [Spatial Analysis]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com/hy86652/NYC-Air-Quality-Analysis){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs](https://019ab6aa-10ac-ce1f-12dc-2205acb314fd.share.connect.posit.cloud/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-icon .green}
<i class="bi bi-water"></i>
:::

### Predicting National Flood Insurance Program Claims

Developed regression-based models using FEMA's National Flood Insurance Program dataset (500,000+ records) to predict and explain flood insurance claim amounts. Applied XGBoost, Random Forest, and Lasso regression, with XGBoost achieving the best performance ($R^2 = 0.956$). Utilized SHAP values and Partial Dependence Plots to translate model findings into interpretable insights for disaster risk management and insurance pricing strategies.

::: {.tag-row}
[XGBoost]{.tag} [Machine Learning]{.tag} [Data Modeling]{.tag} [SHAP]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> Code](https://github.com){target="_blank"}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Write-up](https://example.com){target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::


<!-- ========== CTA ========== -->
::: {.section .text-center}
::: {.section-narrow}

## Interested in Collaborating? {.section-heading}

I'm always open to discussing new projects, research collaborations, or job opportunities.

::: {.hero-cta}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn-primary-custom}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/hy86652){.btn-outline-custom target="_blank"}
:::

:::
:::
